mission.title: harbor: "Prevent vulnerable images from running" is broken
mission.description: "Prevent vulnerable images from running" is broken. This issue affects 11+ users.

steps.title: Identify harbor troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your harbor setup:
Check your harbor dependency version in your project manifest.
Check your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue.

steps.title: Review harbor configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant harbor configuration:
As the title says, "Prevent vulnerable images from running" is broken. It works fine for images that have been scanned, but there are times that images can make it into the registry without being scanned.

steps.title: Apply the fix for "Prevent vulnerable images from running" is broken
steps.description:
Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:
```yaml
> docker pull my-registry/test/rancher/mirrored-coreos-etcd:v3.5.3

```

steps.title: Confirm "Prevent vulnerable images from running" is broken is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test harbor to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
